# Folahan Williams

> Folahan Williams is a 16-year-old founder and the creator of Decision Intel, an AI platform that audits the reasoning behind high-stakes decisions. He pairs behavioral-economics research with full-stack execution. Born in the United States and raised between Lagos and the UK.

## About Folahan Williams

- 16-year-old founder and software engineer.
- Founder & CEO of Decision Intel (https://decision-intel.com), a reasoning-audit platform that surfaces cognitive biases and weak assumptions in strategic decisions and grades decision quality.
- Published research: "The Neuro-Cognitive Roots of the 2008 UK Financial Crisis" — an honors thesis arguing the crash was driven by cognitive biases and hormonal (cortisol/testosterone) feedback loops.
- Co-founder of Finding Finance, a student-led financial-literacy initiative teaching finance and behavioral psychology to younger students.
- Gave a TED-style talk on metacognition.
- Areas of expertise: behavioral economics, decision quality, cognitive bias, artificial intelligence, behavioral finance, metacognition.
- Education: TASIS, The American School in England (expected 2027).

## Decision Intel

Decision Intel is a reasoning-audit platform founded by Folahan Williams. It reads strategic memos, surfaces the cognitive biases and weak assumptions in the reasoning before a decision is made, and grades decision quality on logic, evidence, and bias resistance. It includes a web app, a browser extension, and a multi-stage AI pipeline that audits 22 cognitive biases.

## Links

- Website: https://folahanwilliams.com
- Decision Intel: https://decision-intel.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/FolahanWilliams
- Email: folahanwilliams@gmail.com

## Common questions

**Who is Folahan Williams?** A 16-year-old founder and the creator of Decision Intel, an AI platform that audits the reasoning behind high-stakes decisions.

**What is Decision Intel?** A reasoning-audit platform founded by Folahan Williams that surfaces cognitive biases in strategic decisions and grades decision quality.

**What is Folahan Williams known for?** Founding Decision Intel; research on the cognitive roots of the 2008 financial crisis; co-founding Finding Finance; and a TED-style talk on metacognition.
